name: Ironmere Expedition
specialty: A renowned duo specializing in swift, precise combat and tactical analysis, setting them apart as the go-to team for complex infiltrations and extraction missions.

members.name: Kael Ironfist
members.note: A veteran with a scarred face and a reputation for ruthless efficiency, earning him the nickname 'The Iron Gauntlet'.

members.name: Eira Silverstrike
members.note: A cool, calculating woman with an uncanny ability to find even the most elusive targets, earning her the nickname 'The Silver Sentinel'.

visual: The pair can often be seen in matching armor adorned with the Argent Blades insignia, carrying short swords and daggers with precision. Kael's armor bears a distinct, polished iron gauntlet, while Eira's is adorned with intricate silver filigree.
reputation_note: Rumors swirl about their past, hinting at dark ties to the Argent Blades, though they are known to deliver results, regardless of the cost.
